name: approveSuggestedPost
description: Use this method to approve a suggested post in a direct messages chat. The bot must have the 'can_post_messages' administrator right in the corresponding channel chat

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the target direct messages chat

parameters.name: message_id
parameters.description: Identifier of a suggested post message to approve

parameters.name: send_date
parameters.description: Point in time (Unix timestamp) when the post is expected to be published; omit if the date has already been specified when the suggested post was created. If specified, then the date must be not more than 2678400 seconds (30 days) in the future.
